_comment: Maps each gold-set CSV to its tender PDF + the page range the gold covers. Add an entry when you finish labelling a tender (see labelling-guide.md). Set "draft": true for in-progress / example-only gold so the aggregate eval skips it. Run: python -m engine.scripts.eval_all

tenders.title: MAC Museum Cleaning Services ITT
tenders.note: UNVALIDATED — auto-generated gold, not yet human-checked to labelling-guide.md. Issues: 88/92 rows marked is_gating=true (manufactures artifact 'dangerous misses'); type uses Specification/Commercial/etc not the mandatory/optional enum; source_page is strings ('Appendix 1 p.1') not integers. Excluded from the scored aggregate until a human cleans it. See comms G-014.
